prestazioni: J37A4 3.7L V6 engine: Full bolt-on forced induction kit using a Garrett GT3582R turbo (850whp capable) with a custom Precision Turbo & Engine 46mm wastegate, paired with a PRL Motorsports J-Pipe downpipe and a 3.5" Vibrant Performance exhaust system with GESI catalytic converters for emissions compliance.

J37A4 internals upgrade: Forged pistons from JE (2618 alloy, 9.5:1 compression), Eagle Specialty Products H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Callies Compstar. Clutchmasters FX500 twin-disc clutch with a lightweight flywheel for rapid engagement.

Custom Hondata KPro V4 ECU tune with a 3.5 bar MAP sensor, ID1000 fuel injectors, and a Walbro 450LPH in-tank fuel pump. AEM Infinity 7 standalone ECU for advanced traction control and launch control, paired with a custom intercooler setup from GReddy (Type-RS front-mount) and a Koyorad aluminum radiator.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V2 widebody kit (TL-S specific) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, paired with a Seibon carbon fiber hood (OEM-style with functional vents) and a custom rear diffuser from Varis Japan.

Work Meister S1 3P 19x9.5 +30 front and 19x11 +45 rear wheels, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (255/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear). BC Racing BR coilovers with Swift springs and custom camber plates for aggressive stance.

Full custom interior with Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber backs), a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel, and a custom roll cage from Hard Dog Motorsports (bolt-in, 6-point). Engine bay dressed with a custom carbon fiber strut bar from Password:JDM and a full titanium bolt kit from ARP.
